message:
feat(collect): Implement N_eff_cores CPU capacity derivation

- Add cpu_capacity.rs: Derives effective CPU core count from multiple constraints
- Parse CPU affinity from /proc/[pid]/status Cpus_allowed_list
- Parse cpuset constraints from cgroup v2/v1 cpuset.cpus files
- Integrate CPU quota from cgroup module
- Compute N_eff_cores = min(affinity, cpuset, quota) conservatively
- Full provenance tracking for explainability

17 unit tests covering CPU list parsing and constraint combinations.

Closes process_triage-cfon.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
